info.name: JAAP Backend API - Complete
info.description: Complete API collection for JAAP Backend with authentication, message management, device management, and admin features

item.name: Devices

request.description:
Register a new device or update existing device token. Public endpoint - no authentication required.

**Request Body:**
- `fcmToken` (required): Firebase Cloud Messaging token
- `deviceType` (required): "android" or "ios"

**Behavior:**
- If token exists and is inactive → Reactivates it
- If token exists and is active → Updates device type if changed
- If token is new → Creates new device record

**Response Format (New Device):**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Request successful",
  "data": {
    "device": {
      "id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
      "fcmToken": "test-fcm-token-android-123",
      "deviceType": "android",
      "isActive": true
    },
    "isNew": true
  }
}
```

variable.description: FCM token of the device to deactivate

item.description: Device management endpoints for FCM token registration and management

request.description:
Send push notification to all active registered devices via Firebase Cloud Messaging. Requires JWT authentication.

**Request Body:**
- `title` (required): Notification title
- `body` (required): Notification message body
- `link` (optional): Deep link URL
- `scheduledAt` (optional): ISO 8601 date-time for scheduled delivery

**Features:**
- Sends to all active FCM tokens in batches of 500
- Automatically marks invalid tokens as inactive
- Saves notification to message history
- Returns detailed success/failure statistics

**Response Format (Immediate Send):**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Request successful",
  "data": {
    "success": true,
    "notification": {
      "successCount": 150,
      "failureCount": 5,
      "invalidTokens": ["expired_token_1", "expired_token_2"],
      "totalDevices": 155
    },
    "message": {
      "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
      "message": "Emergency Alert: This is an important notification message",
      "title": "Emergency Alert",
      "body": "This is an important notification message",
      "link": "https://example.com/details",
      "isSent": true,
      "sentAt": "2025-03-20T11:30:00.000Z",
      "isPinned": false,
      "createdAt": "2025-03-20T11:30:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2025-03-20T11:30:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}
```

**Response Format (Scheduled):**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Request successful",
  "data": {
    "success": true,
    "scheduled": true,
    "scheduledAt": "2025-03-21T10:00:00.000Z",
    "message": {
      "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439012",
      "message": "Emergency Alert: This is an important notification message",
      "title": "Emergency Alert",
      "body": "This is an important notification message",
      "scheduledAt": "2025-03-21T10:00:00.000Z",
      "isSent": false,
      "isPinned": false,
      "createdAt": "2025-03-20T11:30:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2025-03-20T11:30:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}
```

**Response Format (No Active Devices):**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Request successful",
  "data": {
    "success": false,
    "error": "No active devices found",
    "notification": {
      "successCount": 0,
      "failureCount": 0,
      "totalDevices": 0
    }
  }
}
```

Schedule a push notification to be sent at a specific future time. The notification will be automatically sent to all active devices when the scheduled time is reached.

**Request Body:**
- `title` (required): Notification title
- `body` (required): Notification message body
- `link` (optional): Deep link URL
- `scheduledAt` (required): ISO 8601 date-time (must be in the future)

**How it works:**
1. Notification is saved with `isSent: false`
2. Cron job runs every minute
3. When `scheduledAt` time is reached, notification is sent to all active devices
4. Message is marked as `isSent: true` and `sentAt` is set
5. Invalid tokens are automatically marked as inactive

**Response Format:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Request successful",
  "data": {
    "success": true,
    "scheduled": true,
    "scheduledAt": "2025-03-21T10:00:00.000Z",
    "message": {
      "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439012",
      "message": "Scheduled Maintenance: System will be down for maintenance tomorrow",
      "title": "Scheduled Maintenance",
      "body": "System will be down for maintenance tomorrow",
      "link": "https://example.com/maintenance",
      "scheduledAt": "2025-03-21T10:00:00.000Z",
      "isSent": false,
      "isPinned": false,
      "createdAt": "2025-03-20T11:45:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2025-03-20T11:45:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}
```

Create an instant message (sent immediately to all registered devices). Requires JWT authentication.

**Request Body:**
- `message` (required): Message text
- `link` (optional): URL link
- `isPinned` (optional): Pin status (default: false)

**Response Format:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Request successful",
  "data": {
    "message": {
      "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
      "message": "This is an instant message",
      "link": "https://example.com",
      "isPinned": false,
      "isSent": false,
      "createdAt": "2025-03-20T11:00:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2025-03-20T11:00:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}
```

Create a scheduled message (sent at specified time to all registered devices). Requires JWT authentication.

**Request Body:**
- `message` (required): Message text
- `link` (optional): URL link
- `isPinned` (optional): Pin status (default: false)
- `scheduledAt` (required for scheduled): ISO 8601 date-time

**Note:** The scheduler runs every minute and will send this message to all active devices when `scheduledAt` time is reached.

**Response Format:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Request successful",
  "data": {
    "message": {
      "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
      "message": "This is a scheduled message",
      "link": "https://example.com",
      "isPinned": false,
      "scheduledAt": "2025-03-21T10:00:00.000Z",
      "isSent": false,
      "createdAt": "2025-03-20T11:00:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2025-03-20T11:00:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}
```

variable.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the message to delete
MongoDB ObjectId of the message to pin/unpin

request.description:
Toggle the pinned status of a message. If pinned, it will be unpinned and vice versa. Requires JWT authentication.

**Path Parameter:**
- `id`: MongoDB ObjectId of the message

**Response Format:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Request successful",
  "data": {
    "message": {
      "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
      "message": "Pinned message",
      "isPinned": true,
      "isSent": false,
      "createdAt": "2025-03-20T11:00:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2025-03-20T11:05:00.000Z"
    },
    "isPinned": true
  }
}
```

item.name: Admin

request.description:
Retrieve all messages from the last 2 days for admin review. Requires JWT authentication.

**Response Format:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Request successful",
  "data": {
    "messages": [
      {
        "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
        "message": "Recent message",
        "link": "https://example.com",
        "isPinned": false,
        "scheduledAt": null,
        "isSent": true,
        "createdAt": "2025-03-20T10:30:00.000Z",
        "updatedAt": "2025-03-20T10:30:00.000Z"
      }
    ],
    "total": 1,
    "period": "Last 2 days"
  }
}
```
